content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the image into a JSON format. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a data sheet page from Texas Instruments. - **Header:** Texas Instruments logo, website, part number (TLV757P), document number (SBVS322C), and date (October 2017 – Revised March 2024). - **Section 5.4:** "Thermal Information". - **Table:** A large table detailing thermal metrics for different packages (DYD, DBV, DRV) and units. - **Footnotes:** Two footnotes explaining the table data. - **Section 5.5:** "Electrical Characteristics". - **Text:** A paragraph describing the operating conditions for the electrical characteristics. - **Table:** A large table detailing electrical parameters, test conditions, and typical values. - **Footer:** Copyright information, product folder links, and submission feedback link. **2. Extract content:** **Header:** - Logo: Texas Instruments - Part Number: TLV757P - Document: SBVS322C – OCTOBER 2017 – REVISED MARCH 2024 **Section 5.4:** - Title: 5.4 Thermal Information **Table 1 (Thermal Metrics):** - Columns: PCB, THERMAL METRIC(1) (2), TLV757 (DYD (SOT-23), DBV (SOT-23), DRV (SON)), UNIT - Rows: EVM (RθJA, ψJT, ψJB), JEDEC (RθJA, RθJC(top), RθJB, ψJT, ψJB, RθJC(bot)) **Footnotes:** - (1) For more information about traditional and new thermal metrics, see the Semiconductor and IC Package Thermal Metrics application report. - (2) JEDEC thermal metrics apply to JEDEC standard PCB (2s2p, no vias to internal plane and bottom layer). EVM metrics apply to the LP087A EVM with an exposed pad SOT-23-5 (DYD) layout. **Section 5.5:** - Title: 5.5 Electrical Characteristics **Text:** - "over operating free-air temperature range (TJ = –40°C to +125°C), VIN = VOUT + 0.5 V or 1.45 V (whichever is greater), IOUT = 1 mA, VEN = VIN, and CIN = COUT = 1 µF (unless otherwise noted); all typical values are at TJ = 25°C." **Table 2 (Electrical Characteristics):** - Columns: PARAMETER, TEST CONDITIONS, MIN, TYP, MAX, UNIT - Rows: VIN, VOUT, Output accuracy (4 conditions), Line regulation, Load regulation (DRV, DBV), Load regulation (DYD), Ground current (3 conditions), Shutdown current, Output current limit (2 conditions), Short circuit current limit. **Footer:** - Copyright © 2024 Texas Instruments Incorporated - Submit Document Feedback - Product Folder Links: TLV757P - Page 5 **3. Format as JSON:** I will structure the extracted data into a list of dictionaries, where each dictionary represents a block of text or a table. ```json [{"bbox": [85, 34, 247, 80], "category": "header", "text": "Texas Instruments\nwww.ti.com"}, {"bbox": [848, 56, 912, 68], "category": "header", "text": "TLV757P"}, {"bbox": [616, 68, 912, 80], "category": "header", "text": "SBVS322C – OCTOBER 2017 – REVISED MARCH 2024"}, {"bbox": [89, 95, 297, 111], "category": "title", "text": "5.4 Thermal Information"}, {"bbox": [89, 116, 906, 311], "category": "table", "text": "

EVM metrics apply to the LP087A EVM with an exposed pad SOT-23-5 (DYD) layout."}, {"bbox": [89, 391, 339, 406], "category": "title", "text": "5.5 Electrical Characteristics"}, {"bbox": [89, 411, 906, 439], "category": "text", "text": "over operating free-air temperature range ($T_{J} = -40^{\\circ}C$ to $+125^{\\circ}C$), $V_{IN} = V_{OUT} + 0.5$ V or 1.45 V (whichever is greater), $I_{OUT} = 1$ mA, $V_{EN} = V_{IN}$, and $C_{IN} = C_{OUT} = 1$ $\\mu$F (unless otherwise noted); all typical values are at $T_{J} = 25^{\\circ}C$."}, {"bbox": [89, 438, 906, 740], "category": "table", "text": "
